channel.title: MoVets.org — Missouri Disabled Veterans Homestead Exemption
channel.description: News and updates on Missouri HB2089 — fair property tax relief for disabled veterans.

item.title: Veteran Tax Relief Gains Bipartisan Support
item.description: HB2089 and companion bills authorizing the Missouri Disabled Veterans Homestead Exemption are gaining bipartisan momentum in Jefferson City.

item.title: How the Exemption Works
item.description: A plain-language breakdown of how HB2089 would provide tiered property tax relief based on VA disability rating.

item.title: Welcome to MoVets.org
item.description: A non-partisan, grassroots effort to help Missouri's disabled veterans get fair property tax relief through HB2089.
